title: 31PCS Multi Tool Blade Set, Universal Oscillating Saw Blades, Oscillating Tool Accessories for Wood Metal Cutting, Multitool Blades fit Makita, Milwaukee, Dremel, Ryobi and More
features: Multitool Blades Universal: These oscillating saw blades compatible with Dewalt DCS355N, DWE315 Corded, DCS355D1-GB, 20V MAX XR, DWE315KT-LX, DCS356NT, compatible with Makita TM3000C, DTM50Z, DTM51Z, TM3010CK, compatible with inhell TC-MG 18 Li, TC-MG 12/1 Li, TE-MG 350 EQ, TC-MG 250 CE, compatible with Milwaukee C12MT-0 M12, M18BMT-0 M18, MILM12FMT0, RYOBI RMT18-0 18V, PBLMT50B.

Compatible Types: These oscillating saw blades compatible with Fein Multimaster 250, Fein RT-MG108L, RT-MG200E / 2F, compatible with Bosch Professional GOP10,8 VLI, GOP 250 300 AEG, compatible with Bosch Multi-X, PMF 180, PMF190, Aldi Workzone, CEL MTP1, 144MT 14,4 V. , Challenge Extreme, Draper Worx WX680, SDS Sonicrafter F30, F50, WX678.9 Li-Ion, WX667.1, WX679 250 W, Multitalent FMM350Q FMT250 FMM250Q, Hitachi CV18DBL / W4 18V Builder ERB474HTL.

Incompatible Part of Saw Blades: Not compatible with Bosch Professional Star-Lock, PMF 250CES, PMF 220CE, PMF 350CES, Advancedmlti 18, Universalmlti 12, GOP12V-18, GOP18V-18, GOP30-28, GOP40-30, GOP55-36, Bosch MX30 , Not compatible with Bosch & Fein Supercut & Fein Star-Lock (Star-Lock, Star-Lock Plus, Star-Lock Max). Not compatible with Dremel or Bosch Quick Release tools, Not compatible with Fein Star-Lock ,Fein Multimaster FMM 350, FMM 500, FMM 500, AMM 350, AMM 500, AMM 700, Not compatible with Makita Starlock, DTM 52Z.

High Quality Multitool Blades: The Multi-Tool Saw Blade Set made of high carbon steel and bimetallic materials. The precision Japanese teeth feature a long wavy tooth design that reduces lateral friction during cutting, prevents sawdust clogging, dissipates heat and prevents jamming, allowing for efficient and durable cuts in a wide range of complex environments.

Precision Cutting: With built-in length markings on both sides of the oscillating saw blades, one side in inches and the other in millimetres, you can quickly and accurately measure the depth of cut, making it easy to make precise cuts and giving you an efficient working experience. Designed with a universal interface, it is compatible with most multi-tools on the market.

Widely Use Range: Multi-tool saw blade set includes 8 different types of oscillating saw blades, different types of saw blades can meet different cutting needs, can be used to cut wood, metal, plastic and other materials, help you solve a variety of home repair or renovation work, can be used in the workshop, home or anywhere else. Ideal for DIY enthusiasts, carpenters, plumbers and electricians.

Different types of saw blades can meet different cutting needs, can be used to cut wood, metal, plastic and other materials, help you solve a variety of home repair or renovation work, ideal for DIY enthusiasts, carpenters, plumbers and electricians. The multi-tool saw blade set is made from high carbon steel and bimetallic materials to ensure wear resistance and extra long life, with built-in length markings on both sides, making it easy for you to make precise and fast cuts for an efficient work experience. Precision Japanese saw teeth are sharper and CR-V material is more durable, featuring a long wavy tooth design that reduces lateral friction during cutting, prevents sawdust clogging, dissipates heat and prevents jamming, resulting in efficient and durable cuts in a variety of complex environments. The precision wavy teeth are designed for faster and cleaner cuts in wood and plastic, and can also be used to cut holes in wood, drywall, laminate flooring, plastic pipes, skirting boards and more.
